artifact: Counts 2010 races whose circuit countries are outside Asia and Europe.
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS race_count FROM races r JOIN circuits c ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId WHERE r.year = 2010 AND c.country IN ('Australia', 'Brazil', 'Canada', 'USA', 'Mexico', 'Argentina', 'South Africa', 'Morocco');

raw_response.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS race_count FROM races r JOIN circuits c ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId WHERE r.year = 2010 AND c.country IN ('Australia', 'Brazil', 'Canada', 'USA', 'Mexico', 'Argentina', 'South Africa', 'Morocco');
raw_response.artifact: Counts 2010 races whose circuit countries are outside Asia and Europe.
